testcase.name: cancelBooking_notFound_throwsException
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-26T12:57:02.856+05:30 INFO 31176 --- [booking-service] [ main] c.travel.booking.service.BookingService : Cancelling booking with id: 999

testcase.name: createBooking_success
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-26T12:57:02.888+05:30 INFO 31176 --- [booking-service] [ main] c.travel.booking.service.BookingService : Creating booking for userId: 1, flightId: 10 2026-05-26T12:57:02.888+05:30 INFO 31176 --- [booking-service] [ main] c.travel.booking.service.BookingService : Created booking with reference: BK-DCE86236

testcase.name: createBooking_insufficientSeats_throwsException
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-26T12:57:02.909+05:30 INFO 31176 --- [booking-service] [ main] c.travel.booking.service.BookingService : Creating booking for userId: 1, flightId: 10

testcase.name: updateBookingStatus_toConfirmed_success
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-26T12:57:02.923+05:30 INFO 31176 --- [booking-service] [ main] c.travel.booking.service.BookingService : Updating booking status to CONFIRMED for id: 1

testcase.name: updateBookingStatus_notFound_throwsException
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-26T12:57:02.923+05:30 INFO 31176 --- [booking-service] [ main] c.travel.booking.service.BookingService : Updating booking status to CONFIRMED for id: 999

testcase.name: createBooking_withFlightAndHotel_createsPackageBooking
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-26T12:57:02.932+05:30 INFO 31176 --- [booking-service] [ main] c.travel.booking.service.BookingService : Creating booking for userId: 1, flightId: 10 2026-05-26T12:57:02.932+05:30 INFO 31176 --- [booking-service] [ main] c.travel.booking.service.BookingService : Created booking with reference: BK-B1DAD08C

testcase.name: cancelBooking_changesStatusToCancelled
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-26T12:57:02.938+05:30 INFO 31176 --- [booking-service] [ main] c.travel.booking.service.BookingService : Cancelling booking with id: 1 2026-05-26T12:57:02.938+05:30 INFO 31176 --- [booking-service] [ main] c.travel.booking.service.BookingService : Booking 1 cancelled successfully

testcase.name: getBookingById_notFound_throwsException
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-26T12:57:02.945+05:30 DEBUG 31176 --- [booking-service] [ main] c.travel.booking.service.BookingService : Fetching booking with id: 999
